introSection: Wild Mouse was a wild mouse roller coaster located at LeSourdsville Lake Amusement Park in Middletown, Ohio, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
This was a German-built Wild Mouse opened in 1961.

The ride supposedly closed around 1964, but the exact date isn't known.

fullText:
Wild Mouse was a wild mouse roller coaster located at LeSourdsville Lake Amusement Park in Middletown, Ohio, USA.

This was a German-built Wild Mouse opened in 1961.

The ride supposedly closed around 1964, but the exact date isn't known.
